title: oncerum ciliatum
intro: Oncerum ciliatum is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oncerum ciliatum include its ability to relieve muscle spasms, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Oncerum ciliatum is often used in the form of teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
